stories.title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
stories.summary: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.

stories.title: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
stories.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.

stories.title: Israeli troops kill two in south Lebanon after lull in fighting, authorities say
stories.summary: Israel's military says the two men were Hezbollah operatives, but the Iran-backed group accuses it of a ceasefire violation.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: A curious crossover: The Toyota C-HR review
stories.summary: Although it's on the smaller side, this electric vehicle is not very chill.

stories.title: ABC asks viewers to protest FCC attempt to "control who is allowed" on The View
stories.summary: "The FCC wants to control who is allowed on the show," ABC ad tells viewers.

stories.title: Early land animals skipped the tadpole phase
stories.summary: Current amphibian development may not have been typical of early land vertebrates.

stories.title: Scientists open a million-year-old time capsule hidden beneath New Zealand
stories.summary: A cave in New Zealand has yielded fossils from a lost ecosystem that existed about 1 million years ago, including a possible flying ancestor of the kākāpō. The discovery reveals that volcanoes and cli

stories.title: NASA’s Cold Atom Lab is creating one of the weirdest forms of matter in space
stories.summary: NASA’s upgraded Cold Atom Lab is turning the International Space Station into a frontier for quantum research, creating ultra-cold matter that behaves in astonishing ways. The experiments could unlock

stories.title: Butterfly that barely ages could help unlock longevity secrets
stories.summary: Scientists discovered that Heliconius butterflies have evolved an extraordinary lifespan, living several times longer than closely related species. Even more surprising, some show little sign of physi

stories.title: This emerging treatment is helping people avoid knee replacement surgery
stories.summary: A minimally invasive treatment called GAE is helping people with chronic knee pain get back to gardening, cycling, and other activities without undergoing knee replacement surgery. Early studies sugge

stories.title: Scientists say most people need more protein than current guidelines suggest
stories.summary: A new review suggests that doing more exercise and eating more protein than current minimum recommendations may help people stay stronger, sharper, and more independent as they age. The goal isn'

stories.title: A common vitamin could help fight one of the deadliest brain cancers
stories.summary: A clinical trial is exploring whether high doses of vitamin B3 could give patients with glioblastoma a better chance against the aggressive brain cancer. Scientists found that niacin may help revive i

stories.title: World Cup live updates: Kane, England take on Seme...
NFL nixes 2026 supplemental draft; Sorsby stuck
stories.summary: The NFL has decided not to hold a supplemental draft this year, effectively halting Texas Tech quarterback Brendan Sorsby's path to the league this season.

stories.title: Ronaldo snaps goal drought, 1st to score at 6 WCs
stories.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo made history Tuesday by becoming the first player to score in six different World Cups, finding the net in Portugal's 5-0 win over Uzbekistan.
